title: rosa × gallicoides
intro: Rosa × gallicoides, also known as the French rose or Rosa × centifolia, is a hybrid rose plant that is a cross between Rosa gallica and Rosa centifolia. The medicinal properties of Rosa × gallicoides include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and astringent properties, which make it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions such as acne and eczema. The herbal preparations of Rosa × gallicoides include rose oil and rose petals, which can be used in perfumes, skincare products, and teas to harness its medicinal properties.
